step_rationale: CAD susceptibility locus; drives SMC phenotype transition and plaque inflammation via PDGF signaling.
mechanism: PDGFD promotes smooth-muscle-cell recruitment and phenotypic switching that destabilize the atherosclerotic plaque.

references.title: Molecular mechanisms of coronary artery disease risk at the PDGFD locus.
Integrative functional genomics identifies regulatory mechanisms at coronary artery disease loci.
A genome-wide association study of a coronary artery disease risk variant.
